positive: A detailed, symmetrical illustration of a celestial tapestry featuring interwoven moons, stylized constellations (like Orion and Ursa Major), and abstract nebula elements. The style is clean, highly graphic, and inspired by vintage Art Deco astronomical maps and mid-century modern poster art. Use crisp, thick linework and distinct, deep silhouettes. The color palette must be restricted to metallic gold, deep midnight blue, and soft teal. The composition must be perfectly centered, isolated on a plain cream background, optimized for high-contrast textile printing.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noise, text, signature, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly rendered, low resolution, amateur, grunge, realistic photo, gradient, messy background
